calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-13-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Gwen Washington
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Tanisha McAfee is present.
Attorney Hilary Ferejohn representing the defendant through limited scope.
Litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-17-2011 is vacated.
